rankings.title: The Economic Integration Lottery: How Immigration Judge Leniency Shapes Local Labor Markets
conditions: applicant residence/county can be observed or reliably imputed
county-year exposure is built from quasi-random judge assignment rather than raw grant rates
the analysis prioritizes asylum-exposed sectors/noncitizen outcomes before jumping to aggregate county wages
